In this video

Collapse

00:00:00Introduction and Audience Poll00:05:51Live Demo: The Personal Assistant Agent00:10:01Getting Started: Building a New Workflow in N8N00:15:42Configuring Agent Tools: Gmail, Calendar, and Sheets

00:26:29Writing Agent Instructions and First Test00:30:54Debugging and Refining the Agent's Prompts00:33:58Q&A: Tool Limits and Debugging00:37:42Q&A: Cost, Context Windows, and Connecting Agents00:41:17Q&A: Sequencing, RAG, and Hosting Options00:47:10Publishing the Agent and Final Wrap-Up

View all

What you'll learn

Learn how to set up your first agent

Hands-on introduction to n8n, to help you get started right away

Step-by-step guide

Join us live and receive a step-by-step guide to create your first AI Agent

Real use cases to kickstart your journey

Discover why n8n is so popular and how to leverage this in your day to day

Why this topic matters

AI agents are reshaping how we get work done, automating repetitive tasks, making decisions, and triggering actions autonomously. In this lightning lesson, you'll discover how to build your own agents using n8n, the popular platform buzzing around. This beginners lesson gives you the practical skills to go from zero to a working agent in under 30 minutes.

You'll learn from

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Harold Dijkstra

AI Agents Bootcamp

Instructor on [Maven.com](https://maven.com/no-code-ai/ai-agents-bootcamp?utm_source=instructor) to help non-technical professionals learn how to build their own solutions with AI. 1,200+ Bootcamp students.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

James Devonport

Create With

Today's live demo will be provided by James Devonport, the n8n instructor of the AI Agents Bootcamp.

AI Agents Bootcamp

![Maven](https://asset.brandfetch.io/idIp45c7Hp/idGjMF6-1E.svg)

[See all products from Harold](https://maven.com/no-code-ai)

metadata.twitter:description: AI agents are reshaping how we get work done, automating repetitive tasks, making decisions, and triggering actions autonomously. In this lightning lesson, you'll discover how to build your own agents using n8n, the popular platform buzzing around. This beginners lesson gives you the practical skills to go from zero to a working agent in under 30 minutes.
